# MediaPipe Tasks Vision Vendor Assets

Vendored for local-only hand landmarking. Runtime code must load these files
from `/vendor/mediapipe-tasks-vision/wasm` and must not use a CDN.

Package: `@mediapipe/tasks-vision`
Version: `0.10.35`
License: Apache-2.0
Source tarball: `https://registry.npmjs.org/@mediapipe/tasks-vision/-/tasks-vision-0.10.35.tgz`
